comment: Shared typed-control wire fixture. The hex envelope is produced by the REAL browser chain (keyboard w through the compiled wasm runtime, scaled by the advertised 3.0/1.5/0.9 velocity envelope, encoded by wire.js). clients/web/typed-command.test.mjs proves the browser produces exactly these bytes; crates/pilotage-session/tests/typed_wire_e2e.rs decodes the SAME bytes and drives them through the session engine's command gate to the adapter boundary.
